author: lOrm
content: Fixed in src/context.rs ContextInjector::inject. Added allowlist gate before collecting system_messages, with tracing::warn audit line on drop. 4 forensic tests added (3 negative — denied hook with payload/no-payload/no-user-msg fallback — plus 1 positive control). 1499/1499 lib tests pass (baseline 1495 + 4). cargo clippy --lib --tests -D warnings exit 0. No allow/clippy.toml/ignore introduced.
